# Lang 6b SciPy/Wilcoxon Addendum - 2026-06-19

## Summary

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Existing benchmark JSON | `artifacts/pareto/lang6b_full_19-06-2026.json` |
| Existing detailed report | `REPORT_EVERY_CHANGES/6B_Detail-Result-Analyst_19-06-2026.md` |
| Full rerun needed | **NO** |
| Reason | The JSON already contains 30 paired per-seed HV values for `ar_qiea`, `mo_qiea`, `nsga2`, and `random_front` over seeds 42..71. |
| SciPy version | `1.15.3` |
| Test method | `scipy.stats.wilcoxon`, paired by seed, `alternative="greater"` for AR-QIEA HV > baseline HV |
| Git branch | `main` |
| Git commit | `ad812ab722d60c231fa2217b8ef359eda99c7e4b` |

## Wilcoxon Result Table

| Comparison | n paired seeds | AR wins | AR losses | Ties | Mean HV difference | Wilcoxon statistic | p-value | p < 0.05 |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|
| `ar_qiea > mo_qiea` | 30 | 30 | 0 | 0 | 0.012982293789342 | 465.000000000000000 | 9.31322574615479e-10 | True |
| `ar_qiea > nsga2` | 30 | 3 | 27 | 0 | -0.015264993044687 | 12.000000000000000 | 0.999999948777258 | False |
| `ar_qiea > random_front` | 30 | 0 | 30 | 0 | -0.207955656271450 | 0.000000000000000 | 1 | False |

## SPEC/P1 Gate Conclusion

SPEC/P1 gate result: **FAIL**.

The Lang 6b result remains **FAIL** because AR-QIEA does not statistically outperform all required baselines. In particular, `random_front` has a much higher mean HV than `ar_qiea` on this dataset, and the paired Wilcoxon test for `ar_qiea > random_front` is not significant in favor of AR-QIEA.

This addendum uses only the existing benchmark JSON. No dataset files were modified, and the full benchmark was not rerun.

## Reproduction Commands

```powershell
python -c "import scipy; print(scipy.__version__)"
# Then load artifacts/pareto/lang6b_full_19-06-2026.json and run scipy.stats.wilcoxon(ar_hv, baseline_hv, alternative="greater") paired by seed.
```
